title: SecretRooms-Unofficial
description: Secret Rooms mod, now ported to 1.20.1, 1.21.1 by bay4lly! Features fully functional camouflage blocks, Ghost Blocks, and hidden Redstone. Optimized rendering and bug-free performance for the ultimate stealth experience. Unofficial & high-performance.
body:
Ever wanted to hide your diamonds in plain sight? Or build a secret base that only you can enter? **Secret Rooms** adds a variety of blocks that camouflage themselves to the surrounding world. They look like normal blocks but have extraordinary functions.

This version is a **clean, dedicated port to 1.20.1,1.21.1**, ensuring compatibility with modern modpacks and fixing long-standing rendering issues from previous versions.

### ✨ Key Features

* **Ghost Blocks:** Look solid, but you can walk right through them!
* **One-Way Glass:** See the world while remaining hidden.
* **Secret Levers & Buttons:** Perfectly hidden triggers for your redstone contraptions.
* **Secret Clamber:** Invisible ladders for vertical escapes.
* **Secret Redstone:** Fully functional hidden power lines.

### 🛠️ Installation

1. Make sure you have **Forge 1.20.1** or **NeoForge 1.21.1** installed.
2. Drop the `SecretRooms-x.xx.x-Unofficial-xxxxxxxx.jar` into your mods folder.
3. Launch and enjoy!

### 📜 Credits & Licensing

* **Original Creator:** AbrarSyed
* **Previous Maintainer:** Wyn Price
* **1.20.1,1.21.1 Port by:** bay4lly

> **Disclaimer:** This is an **UNOFFICIAL** port. Please do not contact the original authors for support regarding this version. All rights to the original concepts belong to their respective owners.
